response.justification: While Sarah demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, extensive leadership experience, and solid infrastructure work, she falls critically short on the minimum C++ requirement with only ~1-2 years of explicit C++ experience versus the required 8 years. Her background is predominantly polyglot and web-focused rather than systems-level C++ programming. Though she has leadership experience and cloud exposure, the depth of C++ expertise required for a technical leadership role on a cloud compute platform is a core qualification she does not meet.
strengths: 14+ years of software engineering experience with proven ability to design and ship complex systems
Strong emphasis on testing, software craftsmanship, and establishing engineering best practices across multiple roles
Recent progression to Staff-level roles with demonstrated mentoring and teaching experience
concerns: Critical gap in C++ expertise: only ~1-2 years across entire career versus 8-year minimum requirement
Background is primarily web, full-stack, and polyglot development rather than systems-level compute platform engineering
Leadership experience lacks specific cloud/DevOps platform domain depth and cloud-native infrastructure ownership
